hooks.command: AGENT_NAME=$(cat /dev/stdin 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool_input',{}).get('description','Sub-agent'))" 2>/dev/null || echo 'Sub-agent'); osascript -e "display notification \"$AGENT_NAME finished. Please review the results.\" with title \"Claude Code\" sound name \"Glass\""
